header.label: Stage 6 Phase 5 — Ticket VV (cross-repo path fix, docstrings, smoke test)

scope.summary:
Phase 5 closes Ticket VV (id 317, priority=3/HIGH): cross-repo path resolution audit + Stage 5.3 reversal cleanup. Three sub-items:
(i) CODE FIX — DEFAULT_ROSTER_PATH cross-repo defect in devplatform/tools/autonomy_budget/active_tasks.py line 38. Current: resolves to devplatform/docs/active_tasks.yaml (does not exist). Fix: derive from DEFAULT_BLARAI_ROOT (from _project_context), resolving to BlarAI/docs/active_tasks.yaml (the real, authoritative file).
(ii) DOCSTRING UPDATES (cosmetic) — update three docstrings to be explicit about the cross-repo BlarAI path rather than the ambiguous "docs/active_tasks.yaml at repo root" phrasing. Affected: active_tasks.py, proactive_colead.py, proactive_sdo.py.
(iii) SMOKE TEST — Python-level verification that load_roster() works without an explicit override after the fix, and that the files needed for sprint-command Phase 0 reads are present. Full /sprint-kickoff invocation is NOT in scope (requires a live interactive LA session; cannot be automated from EA).

ticket_vv.title: Stage 6.7.5 Ticket VV: Cross-repo path resolution audit + Stage 5.3 reversal cleanup
ticket_vv.acceptance: 1. DEFAULT_ROSTER_PATH in active_tasks.py resolves to BlarAI/docs/active_tasks.yaml. 2. proactive_colead.py and proactive_sdo.py work without explicit roster_path override. 3. Docstrings in active_tasks.py, proactive_colead.py, proactive_sdo.py are updated to reference BlarAI cross-repo path explicitly. 4. Python smoke test passes: load_roster() succeeds without override, path assertion holds. 5. Sprint Phase 0 file-existence checks pass (active_tasks.yaml, ACTIVE_SPRINT.md, _templates/). 6. STATUS.md E13 entry records Phase 5 complete.

background.defect_analysis:
File: devplatform/tools/autonomy_budget/active_tasks.py lines 37-41 (current):
REPO_ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[2] DEFAULT_ROSTER_PATH = REPO_ROOT / "docs" / "active_tasks.yaml" DEFAULT_SCHEMA_PATH = ( REPO_ROOT / "tools" / "autonomy_budget" / "active_tasks.schema.json" )
Path resolution: __file__ = C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform\tools\autonomy_budget\active_tasks.py .parents[0] = C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform\tools\autonomy_budget\ .parents[1] = C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform\tools\ .parents[2] = C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform\ ← REPO_ROOT
DEFAULT_ROSTER_PATH = C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform\docs\active_tasks.yaml ← DOES NOT EXIST
DEFAULT_SCHEMA_PATH = C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform\tools\autonomy_budget\active_tasks.schema.json ← EXISTS and is correct (schema lives in devplatform)
Real roster path: C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI\docs\active_tasks.yaml (BlarAI repo — authoritative per Domain 9 Theme A design)
Impact: - proactive_colead.py line 67: `roster_path = Path(roster_path) if roster_path else DEFAULT_ROSTER_PATH` → when no override passed (normal fleet firing), reads the broken default → FileNotFoundError - proactive_sdo.py line 66: same pattern → same failure - Any caller that does not explicitly pass roster_path= uses the broken default.
Pre-existing defect: predates Stage 5; not introduced by Item 5.3 reversal. Why not caught earlier: in practice, the scheduled Co-Lead and SDO agents may pass roster_path explicitly (from their wake-up context), masking the broken default. The defect fires silently when the default is relied upon.
background.fix_rationale:
_project_context.py (devplatform/tools/_project_context.py) exports: DEFAULT_BLARAI_ROOT = Path(r"C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI")
This constant is already the established cross-repo BlarAI reference used by blarai_next_task_resolver.py (line 54 import, constructor default). Using it in active_tasks.py is consistent with the existing pattern — no new constant introduced.
Fix: change DEFAULT_ROSTER_PATH to derive from DEFAULT_BLARAI_ROOT. DEFAULT_SCHEMA_PATH stays unchanged — it correctly points to devplatform (where the schema file lives).
No circular import: _project_context.py imports only os, warnings, dataclasses, pathlib, and yaml. It does NOT import from autonomy_budget. Safe to add import.

comprehension_gate.instruction: Respond with a comprehension gate covering CG1-CG7 exactly. Stop after the gate. Wait for Guide APPROVED before any pre-flight or edit.

items.item: State the Ticket VV id, priority, and its three sub-items in order. For each sub-item, state what type of work it is (code fix / cosmetic / verification) and what files are affected.

Explain the DEFAULT_ROSTER_PATH bug in concrete path terms: what does Path(__file__).resolve().parents[2] resolve to for active_tasks.py, what path does DEFAULT_ROSTER_PATH evaluate to currently, and why that path does not exist. Confirm DEFAULT_SCHEMA_PATH is correct and must remain unchanged.

Describe the fix precisely: - What new import is added at the top of active_tasks.py (from what module, what symbol)? - What is the exact OLD line 38 and what is the exact NEW line 38? - Is REPO_ROOT kept or removed, and why? State: how do you confirm there is no circular import risk before making the change?

Describe the three docstring updates (sub-item ii): - active_tasks.py: which line, old text, new text - proactive_colead.py: which line, old text, new text - proactive_sdo.py: which line, old text, new text Confirm these are cosmetic only — no logic changes in these files beyond the active_tasks.py import and DEFAULT_ROSTER_PATH change.

Describe the smoke test (sub-item iii) approach: - What Python one-liner or script verifies that load_roster() works without override? - What path assertion confirms DEFAULT_ROSTER_PATH now resolves correctly? - What three file-existence checks verify sprint Phase 0 read prerequisites? - Why is full /sprint-kickoff invocation explicitly out of scope for this EA?

State the commit plan: branch name, how many commits, which repo each lands in, and what the A33 workaround is for closing Ticket VV (317) and the tracking task. Include the expected backlog after Phase 5 closes.

Confirm all 8 binding acks (g10-ea14_n1 through n8) are understood. For n3 (no-amend doctrine) confirm which 4 frozen verdict files must not be touched. For n7 (smoke test scope) confirm what is in-scope vs out-of-scope for sub-item iii.

preflight.check: Read C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform\tools\autonomy_budget\state.json. Confirm fleet_paused=false. If fleet_paused=true: HARD STOP.

BlarAI: git -C "C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI" tag --list EXPECT: pre-platform-extract AND post-platform-extract present. platform-extracted is NOT a BlarAI tag — its absence is not a defect. devplatform: git -C "C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform" tag --list EXPECT: platform-extracted present (at ae75507). If any required tag absent: HARD STOP.

In devplatform root, run: python -c " from tools.autonomy_budget.active_tasks import DEFAULT_ROSTER_PATH print(f'DEFAULT_ROSTER_PATH = {DEFAULT_ROSTER_PATH}') print(f'Exists? {DEFAULT_ROSTER_PATH.exists()}') " EXPECT: path ends in devplatform\docs\active_tasks.yaml, exists=False. This confirms the defect is present and the fix is needed. If exists=True: HARD STOP — investigate before proceeding (file may have been created erroneously; do not proceed without understanding why).

Confirm C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI\docs\active_tasks.yaml exists and is valid YAML: python -c " from pathlib import Path import yaml p = Path(r'C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI\docs\active_tasks.yaml') assert p.exists(), f'Missing: {p}' data = yaml.safe_load(p.read_text(encoding='utf-8')) print(f'Roster content: {data}') " EXPECT: file exists, YAML loads without error, content printed. If file missing or YAML invalid: HARD STOP.
preflight.fleet_pause:
Pause the fleet using the Python helper: python -c "from tools.autonomy_budget import state; state.pause_fleet('Stage 6 Phase 5 Ticket VV cross-repo path fix', updated_by='ea_code', path='C:/Users/mrbla/devplatform/tools/autonomy_budget/state.json')"
Commit immediately in devplatform (on main, before branching): git -C C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform add tools/autonomy_budget/state.json git -C C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform commit -m "chore(ops): pause fleet -- Stage 6 Phase 5 Ticket VV"
preflight.tracking_task: Create Phase 5 tracking task in Vikunja Project 10 (DevPlatform-Meta): Title: "Stage 6.7.5 Phase 5 tracking: Ticket VV (cross-repo path fix + docstrings + smoke test)" Priority: 3 Labels: Active (id 1), Architecture (id 4), Infrastructure (id 5) Add starting comment: "[agent:ea_code][phase:start] Phase 5 execution started. Scope: Ticket VV (317). Pre-flight checks passed." Record the tracking task ID for PF1 bifurcation at close.

execution.branch_setup: Create and checkout a feature branch in devplatform: git -C C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform checkout -b feat/stage6-phase5-cross-repo-path-fix

edit.instruction:
STEP A — Add import for DEFAULT_BLARAI_ROOT from _project_context. Insert AFTER the existing "from pathlib import Path" import line (or after the "from typing import Any" import — keep imports grouped):
from tools._project_context import DEFAULT_BLARAI_ROOT
STEP B — Change DEFAULT_ROSTER_PATH (line 38): OLD: DEFAULT_ROSTER_PATH = REPO_ROOT / "docs" / "active_tasks.yaml" NEW: DEFAULT_ROSTER_PATH = DEFAULT_BLARAI_ROOT / "docs" / "active_tasks.yaml"
STEP C — Keep REPO_ROOT and DEFAULT_SCHEMA_PATH unchanged: REPO_ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[2] ← keep (= devplatform root) DEFAULT_SCHEMA_PATH = ( ← keep (schema in devplatform) REPO_ROOT / "tools" / "autonomy_budget" / "active_tasks.schema.json" )
STEP D — Update module docstring line 7: OLD: "The roster at docs/active_tasks.yaml is authoritative for:" NEW: "The roster at BlarAI/docs/active_tasks.yaml is authoritative for:"
VERIFY: After edit, run: python -c "from tools.autonomy_budget.active_tasks import DEFAULT_ROSTER_PATH; print(DEFAULT_ROSTER_PATH)" EXPECT output: C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI\docs\active_tasks.yaml

Update roster_path docstring (line ~61): OLD: "roster_path: override for tests; defaults to\n ``docs/active_tasks.yaml`` at repo root." NEW: "roster_path: override for tests; defaults to\n ``BlarAI/docs/active_tasks.yaml`` (cross-repo — Ticket VV fix)."
No logic changes. Only the docstring string changes.

Update roster_path docstring (line ~59): OLD: "roster_path: override for tests; defaults to\n ``docs/active_tasks.yaml`` at repo root." NEW: "roster_path: override for tests; defaults to\n ``BlarAI/docs/active_tasks.yaml`` (cross-repo — Ticket VV fix)."
No logic changes. Only the docstring string changes.

smoke_test.instruction:
Run ALL of the following from C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform with PYTHONPATH set (or equivalent — the devplatform venv already has this configured):
TEST 1 — DEFAULT_ROSTER_PATH resolves correctly and load_roster() works: python -c " from pathlib import Path from tools.autonomy_budget.active_tasks import DEFAULT_ROSTER_PATH, load_roster
# Path assertion expected = Path(r'C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI\docs\active_tasks.yaml') assert DEFAULT_ROSTER_PATH == expected, f'Path mismatch: {DEFAULT_ROSTER_PATH} != {expected}' assert DEFAULT_ROSTER_PATH.exists(), f'File not found: {DEFAULT_ROSTER_PATH}'
# Load without override (exercises the fixed default) roster = load_roster() assert roster is not None, 'load_roster() returned None' print(f'TEST 1 PASS: DEFAULT_ROSTER_PATH = {DEFAULT_ROSTER_PATH}') print(f' roster = {roster}') " EXPECT: 'TEST 1 PASS' printed, no exception. If AssertionError or FileNotFoundError: HARD STOP.
TEST 2 — proactive modules import cleanly and use fixed default: python -c " from tools.autonomy_budget.active_tasks import DEFAULT_ROSTER_PATH from tools.autonomy_budget.proactive_colead import scan as colead_scan from tools.autonomy_budget.proactive_sdo import scan as sdo_scan print(f'TEST 2 PASS: modules imported, DEFAULT_ROSTER_PATH = {DEFAULT_ROSTER_PATH}') " EXPECT: 'TEST 2 PASS' printed, no ImportError.
TEST 3 — Sprint Phase 0 file-existence checks: python -c " from pathlib import Path blarai = Path(r'C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI') checks = [ blarai / 'docs' / 'active_tasks.yaml', blarai / 'docs' / 'sprints' / 'ACTIVE_SPRINT.md', blarai / 'docs' / 'sprints' / '_templates', ] for p in checks: assert p.exists(), f'Missing: {p}' print(f' EXISTS: {p}') print('TEST 3 PASS: all sprint Phase 0 prerequisites present') " EXPECT: 'TEST 3 PASS' printed, all three paths confirmed present.
TEST 4 — DEFAULT_SCHEMA_PATH still resolves correctly (devplatform, unchanged): python -c " from tools.autonomy_budget.active_tasks import DEFAULT_SCHEMA_PATH assert DEFAULT_SCHEMA_PATH.exists(), f'Schema missing: {DEFAULT_SCHEMA_PATH}' print(f'TEST 4 PASS: DEFAULT_SCHEMA_PATH = {DEFAULT_SCHEMA_PATH}') " EXPECT: 'TEST 4 PASS', schema path ends in devplatform\tools\autonomy_budget\active_tasks.schema.json.
If any test fails: HARD STOP. Do not commit.

execution.commit:
Stage exactly the 3 edited files (explicit-add): git -C C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform add tools/autonomy_budget/active_tasks.py git -C C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform add tools/autonomy_budget/proactive_colead.py git -C C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform add tools/autonomy_budget/proactive_sdo.py
Commit message: "fix(autonomy_budget): Ticket VV -- DEFAULT_ROSTER_PATH cross-repo fix; docstring updates"
Do NOT use git add . or git add -A.

vikunja_close.label: Close Ticket VV (id 317) — A33 Option B

execution.vikunja_close: 1. get_task(task_id=317) — capture title, description, priority 2. update_task(task_id=317, title=captured, description=captured, priority=captured, done=True) 3. add_task_comment(task_id=317, comment="[agent:ea_code][phase:completion] Ticket VV complete. Sub-item (i): DEFAULT_ROSTER_PATH fixed — derives from DEFAULT_BLARAI_ROOT in _project_context. Now resolves to BlarAI/docs/active_tasks.yaml. Sub-item (ii): docstrings updated in active_tasks.py, proactive_colead.py, proactive_sdo.py. Sub-item (iii): smoke tests TEST 1-4 all PASS. devplatform commit: <SHA of C1>")

edit.instruction:
1. Update Stage 6 table row to add Phase 5 SHAs.
2. Append evolution entry E13 to the Stage 6 evolution log section: "Stage 6 Phase 5 (Ticket VV) complete. Sub-item (i): DEFAULT_ROSTER_PATH cross-repo defect fixed in devplatform/tools/autonomy_budget/active_tasks.py -- derives from DEFAULT_BLARAI_ROOT (_project_context) instead of devplatform REPO_ROOT; now resolves to BlarAI/docs/active_tasks.yaml. Sub-item (ii): docstrings updated in active_tasks.py, proactive_colead.py, proactive_sdo.py to be explicit about cross-repo BlarAI path. Sub-item (iii): smoke tests PASS (load_roster() without override, sprint Phase 0 file checks). Backlog: 41 total / 22 done / 19 open."
Commit in BlarAI on main: git -C C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI add docs/platform_separation/STATUS.md git -C C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI commit -m "docs(stage6_phase5): record Phase 5 complete in STATUS.md (E13)"

execution.merge:
In devplatform, merge to main (no-ff): git -C C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform checkout main git -C C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform merge --no-ff feat/stage6-phase5-cross-repo-path-fix -m "fix(autonomy_budget): Stage 6 Phase 5 -- cross-repo path fix + docstrings (Ticket VV)"
Record merge commit SHA for close report.
execution.fleet_unpause:
Unpause using resume_fleet (NOT unpause_fleet — AttributeError): python -c "from tools.autonomy_budget import state; state.resume_fleet(updated_by='ea_code', path='C:/Users/mrbla/devplatform/tools/autonomy_budget/state.json')"
Commit in devplatform on main: git -C C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform add tools/autonomy_budget/state.json git -C C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform commit -m "chore(ops): unpause fleet -- Stage 6 Phase 5 complete"
execution.pf1_bifurcation:
PASS path (all 4 smoke tests pass, VV closed, STATUS.md committed, merge done, fleet unpaused): Close tracking task via A33 Option B (get_task → update_task(done=True) → add_task_comment).
HARD STOP path (any smoke test failed before completion): Add comment to tracking task with failure summary. Leave done=false. Per AOAM §4.

ea_dispatch.close_report_format:
Write close report to: C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI\docs\platform_separation\temp_for_responses\6.7.5-EA_INSTANCE_14_STAGE6_PHASE_5_CLOSE_REPORT.md
Report must cover: 1. Phase 5 PASS / HARD STOP verdict 2. Pre-flight results (Check 0a/0b/0c/0d) 3. Sub-item (i): exact import added, old/new line 38, docstring line 7 change 4. Sub-item (ii): exact docstring changes in proactive_colead.py and proactive_sdo.py 5. Sub-item (iii): output of all 4 smoke tests (TEST 1-4) 6. Commit SHAs: pause, C1, STATUS.md, merge, unpause (both repos) 7. Vikunja: Ticket 317 done=?, tracking task done=? 8. Backlog: total / done / open
Post short summary (5-10 lines) to chat.

constraints.constraint: complete_task MCP tool SUSPENDED (A33 data-loss bug, Ticket WW id 318). Use Option B for all task closures: get_task → update_task(done=True, fields preserved) → add_task_comment. Never call mcp__vikunja__complete_task.

Four frozen verdict files must NOT be edited (no-amend doctrine): docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/3.0.v2-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_7_STAGE3_COMPREHENSIVE_AUDIT_CHECKPOINT.xml docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/3.1.v2-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_7_ITEM_3_1_V2_VERIFIED_SPEC_CORRECTION_AUTHORIZED.xml docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/3.2.v2-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_7_ITEM_3_2_V2_RECLASSIFICATION_REQUIRED_SELECTIVE_COPY_AUTHORIZED.xml docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/3.10-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_7_STAGE3_CLOSE_VERIFIED.xml
All git add commands name files explicitly. Never git add . or git add -A.

Only 3 files change in C1: active_tasks.py, proactive_colead.py, proactive_sdo.py. No other autonomy_budget files, no test files, no README changes unless a clear docstring defect is found during verification. If additional defects are found, document in close report and defer to Stage 6.7.5 backlog — do not expand scope.

Full /sprint-kickoff invocation is NOT in scope. The sprint skills require an interactive LA session and cannot be automated from an EA dispatch. Sub-item (iii) is Python-level verification only (TEST 1-4 above). Mark full skill invocation as "requires manual LA verification" in close report.

exclusions.item: WW (318): complete_task MCP bug fix — standing open, not this phase.
B (310), C (311), D (312), E (313), and remaining 15 open tickets — future phases.
blarai_next_task_resolver.py README alignment (mentioned in ticket) — read and verify alignment is already correct; document in close report. Only edit if genuinely incorrect.

acknowledgements.ack: Fleet-pause SOP: state.pause_fleet(...) + commit BEFORE branch checkout; state.resume_fleet(...) (NOT unpause_fleet) + commit as LAST action.
Explicit-add discipline: all git add commands name files explicitly. Never git add . or git add -A.
No-amend doctrine: 4 frozen verdict files (3.0.v2, 3.1.v2, 3.2.v2, 3.10) must not be edited. These are in docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/.
A33 workaround: mcp__vikunja__complete_task SUSPENDED. Use Option B for VV (317) and the Phase 5 tracking task: get_task → update_task(done=True, fields preserved) → add_task_comment.

Check 0b is two-repo: BlarAI must have pre-platform-extract + post-platform-extract. devplatform must have platform-extracted at ae75507. platform-extracted is NOT a BlarAI tag — its absence from BlarAI is not a defect.

DEFAULT_SCHEMA_PATH must stay unchanged. It correctly points to devplatform/tools/autonomy_budget/active_tasks.schema.json (the schema lives in devplatform). Only DEFAULT_ROSTER_PATH is broken and must be fixed.

Smoke test scope: sub-item (iii) is Python-level only (TEST 1-4). Full sprint skill invocation (/sprint-kickoff etc.) requires an interactive LA session and is out of EA scope. Close report must explicitly note this as pending LA verification.
PF1 bifurcation per AOAM §4: PASS path closes tracking task (done=True, Option B); HARD STOP path adds comment + leaves done=false.

guide_verification.check: devplatform: git log --oneline HEAD shows unpause → merge → C1 → pause (reverse chrono)

devplatform: git show C1_SHA -- tools/autonomy_budget/active_tasks.py confirms: - new import from tools._project_context import DEFAULT_BLARAI_ROOT - line 38 change: REPO_ROOT → DEFAULT_BLARAI_ROOT - REPO_ROOT and DEFAULT_SCHEMA_PATH lines unchanged
devplatform: git show C1_SHA -- tools/autonomy_budget/proactive_colead.py confirms docstring update only
devplatform: git show C1_SHA -- tools/autonomy_budget/proactive_sdo.py confirms docstring update only
BlarAI: git log --oneline HEAD shows STATUS.md E13 commit
Vikunja: project_summary shows 41 total / 22 done / 19 open
guide_verification.backlog_expectation: Before Phase 5: 40 total / 20 done / 20 open Phase 5: +1 total (tracking task) / +2 done (VV + tracking task) / -1 open (VV) After Phase 5: 41 total / 22 done / 19 open
